Author: gabor Date: Wed Jan 22 18:40:57 2014 New Revision: 43631 URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/43631 Log: - Fix base selection for news, events and press lists on the index page for languages that do not have a translation of these PR: www/105333 Submitted by: Rudolf Cejka Modified: head/share/xml/libcommon.xsl Modified: head/share/xml/libcommon.xsl ============================================================================== --- head/share/xml/libcommon.xsl Wed Jan 22 14:34:08 2014 (r43630) +++ head/share/xml/libcommon.xsl Wed Jan 22 18:40:57 2014 (r43631) @@ -1197,6 +1197,10 @@
+ + &enbase;/ + &base;/ + news/newsflash.html# @@ -1311,6 +1315,10 @@
+ + &enbase;/ + &base;/ + news/press.html# @@ -1429,7 +1437,7 @@ - &enbase;/ + &enbase;/ &base;/ events/# _______________________________________________ svn-doc-all@freebsd.org mailing list http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-doc-all To unsubscribe, send any mail to "svn-doc-all-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
